title: Mammalian Cell Nucleus Staining
author: Kenneth Schackart
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xswfnfe

steps.title: Using micropipette, remove cell culture media from each well
steps.instruction: Using micropipette, remove cell culture media from each well.

steps.title: Wash each well twice with 100 µL DPBS
steps.instruction: Wash each well twice with 100 µL DPBS.

steps.title: Add 100 µL NucBlue™ solution to each well
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL NucBlue™ solution to each well.

steps.title: Cover with aluminum foil
steps.instruction: Cover with aluminum foil. The aluminum foil is simply to prevent photobleaching of the fluorescent dye.
